items.name: Lobalita
items.summary: Modern Mexican cantina from the team behind Bar Darling, highlighted on Eater SF's May 2026 new-restaurant heatmap.
items.whyItMatters: A new concept from an experienced local team in a high-visibility neighborhood is a useful early momentum signal.

items.name: Equal Parts
items.summary: A large North Beach restaurant led by chef Melissa Perfit, included on Eater SF's current new-restaurant heatmap.
items.whyItMatters: A chef-led opening in a major former restaurant space is the kind of change worth tracking early.

items.name: The Mantis
items.summary: Vietnamese pop-up now operating out of Fat Cat, flagged by The Infatuation as a new SF opening with potential.
items.whyItMatters: Pop-ups that graduate into a regular home often carry built-in audience momentum and room to evolve.

items.name: Glasswing by Alexandru Simon
items.summary: Listed by Falstaff among Vienna restaurants newly awarded one Michelin star in the 2026 Austria guide.
items.whyItMatters: A new star is one of the strongest public signals that a restaurant's reputation is accelerating.

items.name: JOLA
items.summary: Named by Falstaff as one of Vienna's new one-star restaurants in the Michelin Guide Austria 2026 selection.
items.whyItMatters: A newly starred plant-forward restaurant is a strong upward signal in a city with serious fine-dining competition.

items.name: Opus
items.summary: Included by Falstaff in the list of Vienna restaurants newly awarded one Michelin star for 2026.
items.whyItMatters: New Michelin recognition suggests recent improvement or newly visible excellence rather than settled legacy status.

items.name: Hefenbruder
items.summary: Vienna Wurstelstand notes the craft beer and pizza spot's move into a larger Zieglergasse location, with opening expected at the end of May.
items.whyItMatters: Expansion into a larger space can be a useful casual-dining momentum signal, especially when local coverage expects immediate interest.

sources.name: Eater SF Heatmap
sources.use: Recently opened restaurants, chef moves, local restaurant news.

sources.name: The Infatuation SF New Openings
sources.use: Openings from the past few months that look promising.

sources.name: MICHELIN Guide California
sources.use: New guide additions, new stars, Bib Gourmand, and other official recognition.

sources.name: MICHELIN Guide Austria
sources.use: Official stars, Bib Gourmand, Green Stars, and guide additions.

sources.name: Falstaff
sources.use: Austria-focused restaurant news, Michelin summaries, and openings.

sources.name: Vienna Wurstelstand
sources.use: Local openings and informal city food-scene coverage.
